The 1000 Mile Run Socklet is soft, breathable and comfortable to keep feet protected and supported during running.

After the success of our Run Anklet style we incorporated those features into a socklet version. Suitable for trainers and for those that prefer a shorter sock.

It’s padded zones on the heel, toes and ball of foot offer superb comfort and shock absorption with the padded tab on the heel extends upwards to protect the Achilles tendon.

The top of the foot section incorporates a ventilation mesh in it’s design. This reduced bulk on the top of the foot makes the sock feel lightweight and helps to increase breathability, keeping your feet cool.

The arch bracing helps keep the sock in place during wear whilst the Y shape heel gives an exact fit on the foot. The flat toe seam helps to reduce irritation and rubbing on the toes.

This single layer sock is knitted to a trainer length for those that prefer a shorter sock.

Through 1v1, 2v2, 3v3, 4v4 and advanced rondo games, players are trained to perform in limited spaces, have multiple touches with the ball, learn to face the opponent directly, combine ball possession with finishing and practice team strategies that apply in real matches.

The BazookaGoals are a significant part of any top-level football training session, as players combine technique, passing, shooting and agility drills to upgrade their individual football skills and improve their overall performance.

BazookaGoal’s high quality and durability has positioned it as the #1 choice for the world’s top Football Clubs, International Academies, Soccer Schools including Liverpool FC, Manchester City FC, Real Madrid CF, Manchester United FC, Arsenal FC, Paris Saint Germain FC, Bayern Munich FC, Chelsea FC, Ajax FC and more!

  • All Weather UPVC Crossbars

  • Recoil frame for safety and stability

column2: BBE Boxing Club FX Boxing Glove
column3:
BBE FX Sparring / Bag boxing Gloves are manufactured from high grade PU synthetic construction, this produces an extremely durable and comfortable fit. These gloves include large hook and loop strap for a secure and precise fit, foam bars above and below strap ensure further protection to the wrist area. These features create a fit and feel of a full leather glove, with increased resistance to abrasion, improved breathability and easy maintenance.

  • BBE 7S Foam features seven layers of enhanced cushioning and high-density injection moulded latex shock foam with closed cell EVA padding combine to effectively attenuate shock.
  • The thumb is designed with an additional inner lining which is reinforced with stitched latex bonding to ensure ultimate protection. Along with double stitching making gloves highly durable.
  • Antimicrobial foams and linings are used to guard against odours. Gloves are made from Vegan friendly materials.

Designed to protect and support the hand when boxing. Hand wraps provide support for the small joints and bones in the hand, wrist and fingers. Used in conjunction with a quality boxing glove they provide optimum support and protection from repeated punches. The high-quality cotton hand wraps are available at lengths of 1.5m, 2.5m, 3.5m, and 4.5m. They are machine washable and feature hook and loop cuff strap fixing.

  • Quality poly / cotton hand wraps.
  • 1.5 metre length for effective fitting.
  • Reinforced hook and loop closure

Worn inside training gloves or mitts as a convenient alternative to traditional hand wraps. They are padded to add extra protection when doing bag work and sparring.

  • Add extra protection
  • Padded
  • Easy slip on & off
  • Material: Poly/Cotton
  • Colour: Black

column2: BBE Boxing PVC Punch Bag Mitts
column3:
The CLUB PVC Bag Boxing Mitts, your go-to choice for impactful training sessions. These gloves, crafted with vegan-friendly materials, deliver both performance and sustainability. Featuring BBE 3S Foam with three layers of enhanced cushioning, these gloves prioritise protection and comfort. The high density injection-moulded latex shock foam, combined with closed-cell EVA padding, effectively absorbs shock, ensuring your hands stay protected during intense workouts.

The thumb area is reinforced with an additional inner lining and stitched latex bonding, offering ultimate protection and stability. Alongside double stitching, these gloves are durable, maintaining their top performance through rigorous training sessions. Moreover, the inclusion of antimicrobial foam and linings prevents odours, ensuring a fresh feel even after multiple uses. These gloves excel in providing reliable protection, durability, and hygiene. Available in S/M (Small/Medium) and L/XL (Large/Extra Large).


Features

  • Advanced protection & comfort: Crafted with BBE 3S Foam and high density injection-moulded latex shock foam, these gloves prioritise protection and comfort
  • Reinforced stability: The thumb area is fortified with an additional inner lining and stitched latex bonding
  • Durable & hygienic: Featuring double stitching and antimicrobial foam, these gloves maintain top performance and prevent odours

The Matte Black Sparring/Bag Boxing Gloves, a fusion of style and performance. Crafted with PU leather to mimic the fit and feel of a full leather glove, these gloves offer a premium experience. Designed for ultimate protection, the thumb area is reinforced with an additional lining and stitched latex bonding, ensuring stability and safety during intense sessions. The gloves sleek matte black finish complemented by spot gloss printing, adds a touch of sophistication to your boxing gear.

Not only are they stylish, they are also made from quality vegan materials, aligning with ethical and sustainable choices. These gloves combine both style and functionality, offering superior protection and a sleek appearance. Available in 12oz, 14oz, and 16oz to match your specific training needs.

12oz boxing gloves are lighter gloves typically used for speed training, pad work, or boxers who prefer a lighter feel. They offer less padding and are more suitable for experienced fighters who want less restriction in movement.

14oz boxing gloves are slightly heavier that are suitable for both training and sparring. They provide a good balance between speed and padding, offering a reasonable protection for both the wearer and the sparring partner.

16oz boxing gloves are the heaviest and are primarily designed for sparring. They offer the most padding and protection, reducing the impact and risk of injury during sparring sessions.

Experience a new level of comfort and versatility with our Compression Waistband, a perfect alternative to traditional armbands and bulky pouches that tend to bounce as you move. This specialized exercise belt is meticulously crafted to securely hug your hips, ensuring it stays put without any bouncing or riding up. No uncomfortable buckles or chafing to worry about – just slip it on, wear it over or under your clothes, and effortlessly slide your essentials through the numerous openings around the waistband.

The sleek, tubular design of the Compression Waistband allows you to carry everything you need with ease, whether you're running, hiking, cycling, hitting the gym, or traveling. Crafted from moisture-wicking fabric, it stretches to accommodate larger phones, offering ample space for keys, cards, IDs, and even small medical devices. For added peace of mind, we have added one pocket with a zipper!

Features:

  • Material: Polyamide Fibre
  • Weight: 85g
  • Measurements: Large (80cm), Medium (74cm), Small (64cm)
  • Washing Instructions: Delicate wash at 30°C

The Compression Waistband is your trusted companion for various activities, including:

  • Running and jogging
  • Walking
  • Hiking
  • Biking
  • Traveling
  • Gym workouts
  • Carrying medical devices
  • Enjoying concerts and amusement parks
  • Dancing, and much more!

Introducing the NightViz Gilet by Bodylite. This innovative gilet is designed for those who refuse to let low light conditions hinder their outdoor activities. This jacket is also perfect for people who want to fit in but who also want to stand out at the right time!

Specifications:

  • Material Composition:

    • Main Body: 88% Nylon & 12% Spandex
    • Mesh: 80% Polyester & 20% Spandex
  • Weight:
    • 270 Grams

  • Enhanced Ventilation:

    • Features side body venting for improved airflow
    • Additional vent on the upper part of the back to maintain comfort during physical activities

  • Water-Resistant Design:

    • The main body of the gilet is water-resistant, providing protection against light rain and moisture

  • NightViz Compatibility:

    • Equipped with NightViz technology at both the front and back for enhanced visibility during low-light conditions

  • Optimal Comfort and Flexibility:

    • Crafted from a blend of high-quality materials to ensure flexibility and comfort during outdoor activities

  • Stylish and Functional:

    • Designed with a balance of style and functionality to keep you safe and looking great during nighttime adventures
  • Guaranteed Irish:
    • This gilet was designed completely by our team at Bodylite. Some elements of this vest were concepts from the students in Irelands South East Technological University (S.E.T.U).

Sizing (Fit): *Size up Recommended for best fit, e.g. if you are a Medium we recommend sizing up to Large.

Sometimes in life, you need guaranteed ultimate protection. Whether you're camping for a long time in unpredictable weather, you need your vintage soft-top to stay a classic or you want your garden furniture to last for years to come, Fabsil Gold Universal Protector is here to help.

This super-concentrated, super-powerful solution is guaranteed to keep you dry and protected from rain and stains. In fact, it’s been formulated specifically for fabrics which are exposed to the elements for long periods of time.

Easily applied, Fabsil Gold will last longer than any other waterproofing treatment, offering unrivalled levels of water-repellency. With 5 times more durability, Fabsil Gold is a best friend to those items that see more than their fair share of wet weather or water – including tents, gazebos, tipis, marquees, parasols, garden furniture, boat covers, sails, soft-tops and much more!

How to use:
This powerful paint-on product is easy-to-apply, just simply follow these 4 steps:

Apply directly to clean fabric.
Apply evenly all over.
Wipe away any excess product with a clean cloth.
Allow to dry completely before use.

Coverage guidelines:

For lightweight nylon materials (often used in tents) coverage is 15-18sq metres per litre.
For lightweight canvas materials, the coverage is 7-10sq metres per litre.
For medium-weight canvas, it's 5-7sq metres per litre.

Top Tips:

As a pre-treatment, we recommend cleaning with Fabsil Tent + Gear
Treat outdoors or in a well-ventilated area
Apply using a clean paintbrush or spray bottle
Apply extra to seams and areas prone to abrasion
For ultimate protection, allow to dry for as long as possible.

Top Tip:

It’s always worth allowing your tent as much time to dry as possible for maximum performance. So, check the weather forecast or pick a few days where the garage won’t be needed, pop your tent up and give it some much-needed TLC.

If you want your gear to last, regular cleaning is important. Even the most effective outdoor gear will begin to lose its ability to protect you against the elements over time. That's because the dirt and residue that settle on your gear all absorb water. As you explore more, your equipment gets dirtier, making it much more likely to leak.

Fortunately, Fabsil Universal Cleaner is here to help. It removes dirt from outdoor fabrics, meaning there are fewer water-absorbing impurities to impair performance, restoring any existing water-repellency. It's also ideal for preparing gear and equipment for a fresh waterproofing treatment as Fabsil proofers are more effective if applied to a clean surface. Simply clean your gear, allow to dry, then apply the Fabsil proofer of your choice.

So, to keep your gear looking and performing at its best whatever the weather, this sponge-on product is all you need!

How to use:
This simple-to-use product is easy-to-apply and effective, just follow these 5 steps:

Brush or wipe off any loose dirt.
Dilute the cleaner as per bottle instructions.
Apply liberally, using a clean cloth or soft brush.
Rinse thoroughly with clean water.
Allow the treated material to completely dry naturally before use.

Top Tip:

We recommend using this to prepare your gear before adding any waterproofing treatment, such as Universal Protector.

Let’s be honest, as much as we love camping, if you wake up in a soaked-through tent, the experience can be pretty miserable. Well, luckily, looking after your tent is so easy with this powerful can.

This paint-on liquid replicates the original water-repellent finish found on all kinds of outdoor gear and equipment – guaranteeing to keep you dry even in the wettest conditions. Additionally, it adds UV protection which means your tent really is protected come rain or shine. So, before you next use your tent or outdoor equipment, make sure it’s adventure-ready with Universal Protector!

Trusted by professionals and outdoor enthusiasts for years, Fabsil Universal Protector is a high-performance, waterproofing treatment, suitable for use on tents, clothing, footwear, garden furniture, gazebos, marquees, soft-top cars, and much more.

How to use:
This powerful paint-on product is easy-to-apply, just simply follow these 4 steps:

Apply directly to clean fabric.
Evenly apply all over.
Wipe away any excess product with a clean cloth.
Allow to dry completely before use.

Coverage guidelines:

For lightweight nylon materials (often used in tents) coverage is 15-18sq metres per litre.
For lightweight canvas materials, the coverage is 7-10sq metres per litre.
For medium-weight canvas, it's 5-7sq metres per litre.

Top Tips:

We recommend cleaning with Tent + Gear Cleaner before application.
Treat outdoors or in a well-ventilated area.
Apply using a clean paintbrush or spray bottle.
Apply extra to seams and areas prone to abrasion.
For ultimate protection, allow to dry for as long as possible.

Our Fitness-Mad peanut massage ball design is perfect for rolling out tight muscles. The dip allows the ball to get close into your back muscles, without putting pressure on your spine. Also great to use for massaging your neck, shoulders, hips, glutes, hamstrings and calves. Ideal for helping to reduce muscle pain and tension. Can be used before or after exercise, or as a general massage too.

How To Use For Back Massage:

Standing next to a wall, place the ball into position between your back and the wall ensuring the dip is in line with the spine (i.e. not touching) and each side of the ball against your back muscles. Leaning against the wall with the ball between the wall and your back then roll up and down, lowering yourself into a slight squatting position and then back to upright again, ensure your feet are approximately hip width apart - do not let your knees over-extend over the toes when at the lowest point of the squat. (Always check with a Doctor before starting a new exercise programme, massage or rehabilitation routine).

column2: Franklin C45° Carbon Hybrid Series Pickleball Paddle
column3:
Franklin Sports is continuing to raise the bar for competitive pickleball by introducing the all new C45° Carbon Fiber Paddle. The C45° is a hybrid paddle that offers a multitude of different technologies, giving each player a combination of supreme control and full power on the court.

DOUBLE THERMOFORMED
The C45° is constructed using a double thermoforming process. This process helps to ensure the integrity of the paddle by enhancing the structure not once, but twice. This brings strength to the unibody design and helps reduce vibration.

45° CARBON SURFACE
The T700 Carbon Fiber is applied as a peel ply texture at a 45° angle. T700 creates a naturally textured surface and laying it at a 45° angle provides a true, consistent texture throughout the entire paddle face, maximizing spin potential.

POWERFLEX™
Our special PowerFlex™ 14mm core is crafted with precision to keep our core fully intact. The premium inner foam layer gives players incredible pop on the court while also providing the paddle with structural integrity.

Dimensions: (W X L) 7.6IN X 16.3IN

Handle Length 5.7IN (14.5CM)

Weight 7.6 – 7.9OZ (215 – 224G)

Handle Circumference 4.3IN (10.9CM)

Swing Weight 104KG/CM²

Twist Weight 5.6KG/CM²

The bat was designed with Ben in mind and the results have been clear to see. His Man of the Match performance in the 2019 World Cup final was just a warm-up for arguably the greatest Test Match innings ever played at Headingley against Australia in the Ashes just a few weeks later, providing two once-in-a-lifetime innings in one summer. GM bats are undoubtedly Made by England’s Best, for England’s Best.

We understand that washing your down gear can be intimidating. 3 dryer balls, which are reusable (for up to 1000 washes) and perfect for preventing clumping and restoring loft to down articles. Grangers' Tent + Gear Cleaner is a sponge-on cleaner designed to clean dirt, dust, pollen and all other performance-impairing impurities from outdoor gear.

Over time, and with prolonged use, even the best outdoor gear will begin to lose its ability to repel water. That's because residues and impurities that settle on your gear all absorb water. As your equipment gets dirtier, the more water it absorbs, leaving it much more likely to leak...

Grangers' Tent + Gear Cleaner can help. By removing the surface dirt from outdoor fabrics, any water-repellent treatments present will be able to work as intended. Any gear or equipment that lacks a protective water-repellent finish can also benefit from being cleaned; any future waterproofing treatments will be much more effective if applied to a residue-free surface. In short, by ensuring your gear remains clean, it will look better, last longer and perform at its best - whatever the weather.

Grangers' Tent + Gear Cleaner is suitable for use on all outdoor gear and equipment and is the ideal way to prepare articles for fresh water-repellent treatments.

A powerful cleaner for all outdoor gear and equipment.

 • Wet the fabric surface.
• Pour 100ml (2 caps) into 5 litres of water.
• Rub into areas requiring treatment using sponge or soft brush.
• Rinse fabric surface.
• Allow to dry fully before use.

• Ensure the fabric to be treated is clean and free from surface dirt. Tents should be laid flat or fully erected prior to application. Protect surrounding areas if required.

Regain the pressure of up to four tennis and padel balls with ease using the innovative HEAD X4 pump pressurizer equipped with an air pump.

This product is user-friendly, cost-effective, and durable, with a capacity to pressurise up to four balls at once. The advanced valve of the product enables easy injection of air into the cylinder to boost pressure and fully restore the balls. This is the most comprehensive and cutting-edge product available on the market, offering convenience and durability.

Product Details

Weight: 440 g / 15.52 oz
Weight with air pump: 593 g / 21.91 oz
Length: 310 mm / 12.20 in
Cover Width: 85 mm / 3.34 in
Cylinder Width: 70 mm / 2.75 in


Insert the nozzle of the air pump into the valve of the HEAD X4 PUMP and press the pressure gauge with the tab raised until a pressure between 22 and 34 PSI is reached. Then, close the tab on the pump and remove the nozzle. Ready, your balls are recovering like new.

By filling the free space with compressed air, we increase the internal pressure of the HEAD X4 PUMP and thus the balls cannot eliminate their internal air, maintaining and recovering the original pressure until the next time they are used.

Don’t forget to remove the air through the valve with the help of the plug before opening the cover of the HEAD X4 PUMP.

EAB is used to support joints and soft tissue strapping and immobilisation. Its strong adhesive helps it stay in place, even in the toughest environments. The Elastic Adhesive Bandage has been designed with a guide line down the centre of the tape. This helps facilitate an even application when using the different sized tapes. An easy unwind will give a better application therefore giving a good level of conformity. EAB Tape is popular in many sports however it is a favourite in rugby for rugby lifting supports on the thighs and giving extra strength to joints. As the tape is elasticated it is not designed to immobilise joints however it ideal for giving extra support to flexible joints like elbows and wrists.

column2: Precision GK Ball Deflector Reactor Frame
column3:
Introducing the Precision GK Ball Deflector Reactor Frame, an essential addition to goalkeeper training sessions across all skill levels. This cutting-edge training tool is designed to challenge and enhance the reflexes and reaction times of goalkeepers. Ideal for both Grass and Artificial Pitches. Elevate your goalkeeper training with the Precision GK Ball Deflector Reactor Frame today!
During Goalkeeper training the coach can strike the ball at the frame and hit the strategically placed floats/buoys and the ball will deviate in different heights, direction, and velocity, adding an unpredictability for the Goalkeeper to react to, reenacting the deflection off defenders in a game like scenario. It also comes with ‘NO PEEK’ sight screen which can further disguise where the ball will deviate to and makes saving the ball even more difficult!

Comfortable Fit: Matrix boots are crafted with high-quality materials that prioritize comfort. The padded interior and cushioned insole provide a snug fit, reducing discomfort during prolonged gameplay. Kids can focus on their performance without worrying about discomfort or blisters.

Durable Construction: We understand the demands of the game, which is why Matrix boots are built to last. The reinforced toe cap and durable outsole ensure longevity, allowing young players to enjoy their favorite sport without the worry of wear and tear.

Eye-Catching Design: Matrix Firm Ground Football Boots feature a dynamic and eye-catching design that will make your child stand out on the field. The vibrant colors and sleek patterns add a touch of style to their game, boosting their confidence as they play.

Versatile Performance: Whether your child is a striker, midfielder, defender, or goalkeeper, these boots cater to all playing positions. The versatile design and reliable performance make Matrix boots suitable for various playing styles and preferences.

These boots not only enhance their performance but also provide the support and style they need to shine on the field. Give them the gift of confidence and let them unleash their potential with every kick, dribble, and goal. Choose Matrix and watch your young athlete excel in their Football journey.

Introducing the PrecisionPLAY Skills Trainer Ramp Rebounder, the ultimate tool to improve your Football skills to new heights. Designed with innovation and functionality in mind, this ramp combines a Skills ramp, rebound board pass section with a chipping/storage catch basket, providing a comprehensive training experience for players of all levels.

The front of the ramp features a specially engineered design that effortlessly returns the ball at varying heights and angles, allowing players to hone their ball control, passing, volleying, and overall skills with precision and efficiency. Whether you're practicing solo in the garden or on the field with a team, the Ramp Rebounder offers an unparalleled training experience that replicates game-like scenarios, helping players develop crucial techniques in a controlled environment.

But the benefits don't stop there. Positioned at the rear of the ramp is a passing rebound board, offering additional opportunities to refine passing accuracy and touch control. Meanwhile, the integrated catch basket in the middle of the Rebounder serves a dual purpose – providing a convenient storage solution for your ball between drills and serving as a target for chipping practice.

Not only is the PrecisionPLAY Skills Trainer Ramp Rebounder highly functional, but it's also incredibly convenient to use and store away if not required for a period of time. Its unique roll/fold-away slat design allows for effortless storage and the retail packaging doesn’t take up too much space on the shelf.

Whether you're a seasoned professional or just starting out, the PrecisionPLAY Skills Trainer Ramp Rebounder is your go-to tool for taking your Football skills to the next level. Elevate your game, train smarter, and unleash your full potential on the field with this innovative training solution.

MATERIAL INTRODUCTION
It does not contain any toxic substances, has high heat resistance, good toughness and impact strength, high strength, flame retardancy, and has a wide range of applications in industry and construction, Such as aircraft canopy, building special-shaped curtain wall, bulletproof glass, riot shield, etc.

GOOD LIGHT TRANSMITTANCE (transmittance up to 90%)
Exposure to sunlight will not cause yellowing, fogging, and poor light transmission.

ANTI-ULTRAVIOLET AND ANTI-AGING
The surface has an anti-ultraviolet co-extrusion layer, which can prevent the resin from fatigue and ye lowing caused by the ultraviolet rays of the sun. The surface co-extruded layer has chemical bonds to absorb UV light and convert it into visible light. It has a good stabilizing effect on plant photosynthesis (very suitable for protecting valuable artworks and exhibits from UV damage.)

TEMPERATURE RESISTANCE
Quality deterioration such as deformation will not be caused in the temperature range of 40°C-+120°C.

FLAME RETARDANCY
According to the national GB8624-97 test, it belongs to the resistance class B1, no fire drop, no poisonous gas.

IMPACT RESISTANCE
The impact strength of PC solid sheet is 250-300 times that of ordinary glass.

SOUND INSULATION
The sound insulation effect is good, and it is the preferred material for highway noise barriers in the world.

column2: Sensory Toys Textured Pads Memory Game
column3:
Sensory memory game is played by placing the smaller discs inside the bag, place your hand inside the bag feeling the texture of the pad and then matching the texture you feel to the larger textured pad using your sight.

The game involves and develops the sense of touch and has a positive effect on the development of a child's small motor skills, concentration and attention. Various disc and ball structures can help the desensitisation of your child's hands or feet. Thanks to walking on the discs, your child develops balance, motor coordination and spatial planning. At the same time, a child's muscular tension is normalised, which can have a positive influence on improving the posture and limiting foot defects ,such as valgus or flat foot.

This game is perfect for making group and therapeutic activities with children more attractive. The discs are perfect for creating various types of obstacles courses and heath paths. The balls may be used for body massage. Each of the pads are different colours, with a different texture and the large pads are each a different shape. There are many ways you can utilise Dive Sticks in a playful manner, from beginners to confident swimmers; below are some examples!

Grab and go: Place each stick at the side of the pool and allow the kids to race and retrieve them from the surface, before swimming back to the starting point. First to bring back their stick wins!

TORQ Recovery Drink is a highly advanced post-exercise nutritional drink formulation that has been designed to Rehydrate, Refuel, Repair and Recharge your fatigued physiology after heavy exercise. We call these the 4 R’s: Rehydrate - Recharge - Refuel - Repair

TORQ Recovery Drink has been designed to work as part of the highly comprehensive and thorough TORQ Recovery System. This system considers the level of activity you are performing and recommends concepts and products from the TORQ range to suit your physical loading in a cumulative fashion. For further information on the TORQ Recovery System.

TORQ Recovery Drink powder is mixed with water to form a very smooth luxurious shake – the fluid content addressing the first of the 4 R’s, ‘hydration’. Our unique matrix of Glucose Polymers, Fructose (Multiple-Transportable Carbohydrates) and Whey Protein Isolate stimulate the rapid absorption of carbohydrate to re-stock vital glycogen stores. Along with our use of high quality Whey Proteins, our active ingredients, D-Ribose, L-Glutamine and blend of carefully selected vitamins and minerals work together to repair and recharge over-stressed muscle fibres. D-Ribose in particular is unique to the TORQ brand and there is no other nutrient available on the market today that is capable of refreshing energy levels at the intra-cellular level. We consider TORQ recovery to be the most thorough and effective formulation of its kind on the market today – yet we flavour it NATURALLY and use no colours or artificial sweeteners. There is not a single ingredient within TORQ recovery’s formulation that isn’t derived from a natural source, or doesn’t naturally-occur within the human body.

TORQ recovery represents this 3:1 blend of Multiple Transportable Carbohydrates and high quality Whey Protein. Research suggests that consuming Multiple-Transportable Carbohydrates and Whey Protein at a 3:1 ratio together immediately after exercise will speed up glycogen synthesis. In other words, the multi-consumption of Whey Protein, Glucose-Derivatives and Fructose-Derivatives will help you to store carbohydrate more effectively than any other method. Research has also proven that Whey Protein is faster acting, more soluble and absorbed/synthesised more readily than any other kind of protein, thus it provides the amino acids necessary for muscle repair with little delay.

Consuming TORQ Recovery within 15 minutes of exercise completion to take advantage of the ‘glycogen storage window of opportunity’ is also essential. This is called the ‘non-insulin phase’ of carbohydrate absorption.

TORQ Hydration drink has a hypotonic formulation, making it the fastest possible way to hydrate, especially when compared to water alone or electrolyte tablets.

The perfect drink for high intensity indoor training, TORQ Hydration mixes easily with 500ml of water and contains the full volume of electrolytes lost through sweating.

Our Hydration Drink Bottle Sample Pack comprises 2 x 18g single serve sachet of all 4 Hydration flavours plus our TORQ 500ml bottle with fluid level markings for accurate mixing. TORQ bottles are BPA-free.

Flavours included: 2 x Lemon, 2 x Tangerine, 2 x Watermelon, 2 x Red Berries

Please Note: TORQ Hydration is the new name for TORQ Hypotonic. The name and branding has changed, but the product is exactly the same.

TORQ Hydration Drink uses passive and facilitated transport mechanisms to optimise fluid and electrolyte delivery. Its hypotonic formulation capitalises on the passive transport process, whilst the high sodium and mild glucose content drives the facilitated transport activity. This makes TORQ Hydration Drink the most thorough and effective hydration product on the market today, with significant benefits over electrolyte tablets. The short video below explains how the passive and facilitated transport mechanisms work – note that the ‘TORQ Hypotonic’ product mentioned is the same product as TORQ Hydration

TORQ Hydration Drink’s advanced hypotonic formulation is specifically aimed at optimising hydration where events/sessions are no more than an hour long, and heavy sweat loss is anticipated. Indoor training activities like Zwift, Sufferfest and studio cycling for cyclists and other indoor exercise classes like body pump and circuit training are good examples. TORQ Hydration Drink can also be used as part of the TORQ Fuelling System during longer events as an alternative to TORQ Energy Drink and is a popular choice with runners who can combine it with TORQ Gels to satisfy their fuelling and hydration requirements.

There is clear justification for taking a smaller dose of TORQ Recovery for lighter-moderate intensity exercise sessions to ‘assist’ in the recovery process – not every session necessarily requires the highest dose. That said, ensure that you take the optimal dose (4 scoops) where necessary – after exhaustive high volume or high intensity workouts (Heavy Exercise). 4 scoops will provide the research-supported 20-25g dose of high quality protein as well as just under 70g of multiple-transportable carbohydrates, which can be further supplemented with additional regular carbohydrate feeds post workout.

What is RFID Secure?
RFID stands for Radio-frequency Identification which is a form of wireless communication that uses electromagnetic fields to identify and track and trace an object. RFID Secure can effectively prevent the transmission to possible thieves by blocking and/or interrupting potential radio waves.

Once applied this hydrocoloid plaster provides immediate relief from the pain of blisters. Not only does it cushion the area to prevent further rubbing it promotes faster healing of the blister underneath.

Long-lasting adhesion keeps the plaster in place on the skin for longer.

Directions for use:

Clean and dry the skin before application. Warm the plaster between the hands for a minute or so. Remove backing paper without touching the plaster adhesive. Centre over blister and apply. Smooth down plaster and warm on with and for a minute or so. Do not remove the plaster – the longer it stays on the more effective the healing. Allow to fall off naturally and replace if necessary with a new plaster.

Includes: Steamer with Remote Control: Effortlessly control the sauna experience with the included remote. The powerful steamer boasts a generous 3.0L capacity, ensuring a consistent and enveloping steam for the ultimate relaxation.

Max Temperature: 130°F / 54.4°C


Benefits:


  • Stress Relief: Step into the Urban Fitness Recovery Home Sauna to unwind and melt away the stresses of daily life. The heat promotes the release of endorphins, leaving you feeling relaxed and rejuvenated.
  • Detoxification: The deep sweating induced by sauna sessions helps flush out toxins from the body, promoting a natural and effective detoxification process.
  • Improved Circulation: The sauna's heat encourages blood vessels to dilate, promoting better blood circulation. This, in turn, can enhance the delivery of oxygen and nutrients to your muscles and tissues.
  • Muscle Relaxation: Feel the tension in your muscles melt away as the sauna's warmth promotes muscle relaxation. It's an ideal solution for soothing sore muscles after a workout or a long day.
  • Skin Rejuvenation: The combination of heat and sweating helps cleanse the skin by opening up pores and promoting a healthy glow. Regular sauna use can contribute to improved skin tone and texture.
  • Cardiovascular Benefits: Sauna sessions can have cardiovascular benefits, such as improving heart health by increasing heart rate and improving the elasticity of blood vessels.
  • Better Sleep: Enjoy a more restful night's sleep after a session in the Urban Fitness Recovery Home Sauna. The relaxation induced by the sauna can contribute to better sleep quality.
  • Weight Management: While not a replacement for traditional weight loss methods, saunas can contribute to temporary weight loss through the elimination of water weight. Regular use, combined with a healthy lifestyle, can complement your fitness goals.
  • Immune System Support: The increase in body temperature during sauna use may mimic a fever-like response, potentially enhancing the immune system's ability to combat illnesses.
  • Mental Clarity: Experience mental clarity and improved focus as the sauna helps alleviate mental fatigue and promotes a sense of well-being.


Safety Warnings:


  • Heat Sensitivity: Consult with a healthcare professional before using the Urban Fitness Recovery Home Sauna if you have heat-sensitive conditions, such as cardiovascular issues, respiratory problems, or skin conditions. Individuals with such conditions should only use the sauna under medical supervision.
  • Hydration: Stay well-hydrated before, during, and after sauna sessions. Prolonged exposure to heat can lead to dehydration, so it's crucial to replenish fluids regularly.
  • Time Limits: Limit each sauna session to a recommended duration (usually 15-20 minutes) to avoid overheating. Prolonged exposure can lead to discomfort, dizziness, or fainting.
  • Pregnancy: Pregnant women should consult their healthcare provider before using the sauna, as elevated body temperature can potentially harm the developing fetus.
  • Medical Conditions: Individuals with pre-existing medical conditions, such as hypertension or diabetes, should seek medical advice before using the sauna to ensure it is safe for their specific health needs.
  • Alcohol and Medication: Avoid using the sauna if under the influence of alcohol or certain medications that may impair heat tolerance or induce drowsiness.
  • Overexertion: Refrain from using the sauna immediately after intense physical activity. Allow your body to cool down before entering the sauna to prevent overheating.
  • Supervision for Children: Keep the sauna out of reach of unsupervised children. The Urban Fitness Recovery Home Sauna is intended for adult use, and children should be closely supervised if allowed to use it.
  • Allergies: Be aware of potential allergies to materials used in the sauna, especially if you have sensitive skin. Discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional if you experience any adverse reactions.
  • Proper Installation: Follow the provided installation and usage instructions carefully. Improper setup or use may result in safety hazards.

Introducing the Urban Fitness Recovery Ice Bath, a compact solution measuring 80 x 75 cm. This ice bath provides a convenient and effective way to introduce yourself to cold water therapy.

Portable - The compact and lightweight design makes it easy to use anywhere, the 6 removable support legs make it easy to assemble/dissemble.

Drain Tap - Easily let the water drain using the quick release tap included.


Cold water therapy involves exposing the body to cold temperatures for therapeutic purposes. The practice has gained popularity for its potential health benefits, although it's essential to note that individual responses may vary.

Potential benefits of cold water therapy include:

Reduced Muscle Soreness and Inflammation: Cold exposure may help alleviate muscle soreness and inflammation, particularly after intense physical activity. It can constrict blood vessels and decrease metabolic activity, potentially reducing swelling and tissue breakdown.

Enhanced Recovery: Athletes often use cold water therapy to accelerate recovery after strenuous workouts. The cold temperatures may help in minimising muscle damage and improving recovery time between training sessions.

Improved Circulation: Exposure to cold water can stimulate blood flow as the body works to maintain its core temperature. This increased circulation may have positive effects on overall cardiovascular health.

Pain Relief: Cold therapy is known for its analgesic (pain-relieving) effects. It can numb nerve endings, reducing the perception of pain.

Potential for Weight Loss: Some studies suggest that exposure to cold temperatures might stimulate the production of brown adipose tissue, which can help burn calories and potentially contribute to weight loss.

Cold water therapy works best when water temperature is matched by time spent, see some examples below:

1°C - 1 minute submersion
3°C - 3 minute submersion
5°C - 5 minute submersion
10°C - 10 minute submersion

Introducing the Urban Fitness VitalFuse, your ultimate companion for nutrition on the go. Designed with an active lifestyle in mind, this bottle combines style, functionality, and durability to keep you fuelled and refreshed no matter where your day takes you.

This bottle is perfect for individuals who are always on the go, simply place the ingredients for your favourite recipe into the blender and blend whilst on the go. The convenient drinking lid makes it super easy to consume, meaning you don't need to switch lids or pour into a separate bottle.

How to Use:

Step 1: Pour water or other desired liquid into the blender.
Step 2: Place pieces of fruit needed for your favourite recipe into the blender.
Step 3: Screw on the lid and tighten sufficiently. Ensure that the arrow at the bottom of the bottle points towards the operation button.
Step 4: Tilt the blender slightly and press the operation button twice to start blending.
Step 5: To make sure that the fruit mixes completely, shake the blender side to side for the best results whilst in operation.
Step 6: After 40 seconds, the blender will automatically stop. Enjoy your freshly made drink!

Please note: The blender will only operate for 40 seconds if there are contents in the bottle, an empty bottle will blend for a much shorter duration due to safety.

The Uwin Champion Junior Tennis Racket range can be used in line with the ITF's Play and Stay campaign, which is a global initiative aimed at making tennis more accessible, enjoyable, and sustainable for players of all ages and skill levels. The campaign uses different-colored tennis balls to match the skill level of the players. Red balls are used for beginners (including children), orange balls for intermediate players, and green balls for more advanced players. These balls are slower and lighter than traditional tennis balls, making it easier for players to rally and enjoy the game.

The Play and Stay campaign recommends that players follow the below guide when choosing a tennis racket. The colour in brackets represents the estimated skill level of players.

  • 19” ideal for 2-4 years (Red, Stage 3)
  • 21” ideal for 4-6 years (Red, Stage 3)
  • 23” ideal for 6-8 years (Red/Orange, Stage 3/2)
  • 25” ideal for 8-10 years (Orange/Green, Stage 2/1)
  • 26” ideal for 9-11 years (Green, Stage 1)

Please Note: The racket colours in the Uwin Champion Tennis Racket range do NOT reflect stages of the Play and Stay campaign.​

These balls are designed in line with the ITF's Play and Stay campaign, which is a global initiative aimed at making tennis more accessible, enjoyable, and sustainable for players of all ages and skill levels. The campaign uses different-colored tennis balls to match the skill level of the players. Red balls are used for beginners (including children), orange balls for intermediate players, and green balls for more advanced players. These balls are slower and lighter than traditional tennis balls, making it easier for players to rally and enjoy the game.
